# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant, version 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) as its code of conduct.

The full text lives at that link and governs participation in every part of this project — issues, pull requests, discussions, commits, and any public or private communication related to the project.

## Reporting

If you see behaviour that violates the covenant, report it privately to **furkankoykiran@gmail.com**. Reports are treated confidentially and acted on promptly.

## Scope

This code applies everywhere the project is represented — online spaces, GitHub interactions, hackathon events, and any venue where a contributor is acting on behalf of Quorum.

## Enforcement

Maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing the standards in the Contributor Covenant. They may take any action they deem appropriate — including warnings, temporary bans, or permanent removal from the project — in response to behaviour they consider inappropriate, threatening, offensive, or harmful.
